title: Kaleido
description: A  library for other mods! It provide some extra api on fabric api.
body:
Kaleido simply adds handlers used by mods created by myself. It provides some extra api on fabric api.I want to open this lib sources code after when I think some api interface was stable.:)
At present, it is only mixing methods about tooltip.
My other mod needs this as the front. 
Installing this alone will not make a difference to your game.
